title: Shattered Kingdom
description: Custom structures, legendary weapons, powerful armor trim powers and weapon bindings that give any item overpowered attacks and benefits
body:
# Shattered Kingdom Data Pack

- Creates a 2000x2000 block world, split into two sides: Positive and Negative
- Players can be divided into two teams and work to build their 1000x2000 civilization bigger and better than the other side
- The center strip of the map (from x=150 to x=-150) is No Man's Land, a place where both teams can trade or fight
- Gives armor trims special effects when wearing just the chestplate OR even better effects when wearing the full set
- Gives some mobs more armor and weapons
- Adds five new "bindings" which give your weapons OP abilities
- Adds five legendary weapons with "binding" effects
- Includes a way to disable tnt and tnt minecarts
- Armor trims cannot be duplicated using the crafting recipe anymore, making getting an entire set extremely difficult
- Open-world mode with custom strucures and boss fights
- Three custom structures (Monument, Ancient City and Shipwreck) with more to come...


Best played with nether and end disabled so late game items can be introduced into the economy gradually with custom structures.

### Armor Trims:
Armor trims now provide bonus effects. Simply apply a chestplate for the level 1 effect or wear the full set of a trim to get the full effect. 


### Weapon Bindings:
You can bind your weapons with minerals such as nautilus shells, amethyst shards and more! Here are the effects of each: 
**Nautilus** - With all armor off, charge the "poseidon's blessing" attack (10min cooldown)
**Ender** - Crouch and hold for 3sec to teleport to where you are looking (1min cooldown)
**Amethyst** - Crouch to attack with a damage aura every 1 second (Uses levels)
**Copper** - Thunderstrike all nearby entities (3min cooldown)
**Chorus** - Crouch to levitate (Recharge by holding the weapon)
**Echo** - Unleash a *devastating* sonic attack. Deals critical damage to all nearby players (10min cooldown)

All bindings can be amplified by increasing their purity. Purity starts at 1 and goes to 5. The amount of bindings you need to increase purity increases exponentially each level. 1 binding for level 1, 2 bindings for level 2, 4 bindings for level 3, etc.
Some bindings amplify trim effects. For example, nautilus increases the effect of the tide armor trim. 



### Coming Soon:
- Effects for the Wayfinder, Host, Raiser and Shaper armor trims
- More weapon bindings
- More legendary weapons
- More Admin controls
- Full support for open-world mode


### NOTE:
This data pack was very specifically designed for the Shattered Kingdom SMP world and will need some major tweaking to setup and make work in your world. Requires some data pack knowledge and experience. The armor trim effects and weapon bindings will be available as a separtate pack with no setup needed soon. When they are available, I will put the links here.
